attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_ATB_DETAILS.ARCH_ID_SEQ, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_ATB_DETAILS.SKU_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_ATB_DETAILS.BUSINESS_SERVICE_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_ATB_DETAILS.ARCHITECTURE_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_ATB_DETAILS.TECHNOLOGY_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_ATB_DETAILS.SUB_TECHNOLOGY_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_ATB_DETAILS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_ATB_DETAILS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_ATB_DETAILS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_ATB_DETAILS.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_ATB_DETAILS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_ATB_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_ATB_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_ATB_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_ATB_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_ATB_DETAILS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_ATB_DETAILS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_ATB_DETAILS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_ATB_DETAILS.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_ATB_DETAILS STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_ATB_DETAILS,
(
select ARCH_ID_SEQ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_ATB_DETAILS
minus
select ARCH_ID_SEQ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_ATB_DETAILS
) ACM
where 
 ACM.ARCH_ID_SEQ = STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_ATB_DETAILS.ARCH_ID_SEQ and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_ATB_DETAILS.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_LW_ATB_DETAILS)
